positive.prompt: Optimize this slow EF Core Linq query to fix an N+1 loading issue
How do I use AsNoTracking and projection in Entity Framework Core?
Profile and optimize generated SQL queries in EF Core

negative.prompt: Design a new database schema and define primary keys
Configure an OpenTelemetry collector in C#

evals.prompt: Optimize an EF Core Linq query that loads orders and order items to avoid N+1 queries.
evals.expected_output: N+1 query loading patterns are replaced with eager loading or projections.
expectations: Eager loading (Include/ThenInclude) or projection (Select) is implemented
AsNoTracking is applied for read-only database fetches
The SQL generated is analyzed or optimized for execution cost
The N+1 loading pattern is completely eliminated
